hooks.commandWindows: $root = if ($env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT } else { $env:PLUGIN_ROOT }; if ($root -and (Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { node "$root\hooks\callbell-context.js" }; exit 0

$root = if ($env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT } else { $env:PLUGIN_ROOT }; if ($root -and (Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { node "$root\scripts\callbell-telegram-notify.js" }; exit 0
